passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
source_phrases: Admits 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island, or from Hingham to Peddocks Island.
This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October.
Please CHECK SCHEDULE on website before booking. Not all islands are open every day.
Specific dates and islands for the current 2026 season are at
https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferryschedule/

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Admits 3 visitors at half price admission per person to the Discovery Museum as well as Discovery Woods. 
Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
source_phrases: Admits 3 visitors at half price admission per person to the Discovery Museum as well as Discovery Woods.
Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 2 adults and 2 children in one vehicle at a 50% discount for general admission.
Not valid for tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express Train, or special ticketed events.
source_phrases: Admits up to 2 adults and 2 children in one vehicle at a 50% discount for general admission.
Not valid for tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express Train, or special ticketed events.

passes.title: Ecotarium
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at half off per person.
Admission to the Museum of Natural History also allows visitors entry to the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology (located in the same complex).
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at half off per person.
Admission to the Museum of Natural History also allows visitors entry to the Peabody Museum of Archaeology and Ethnology (located in the same complex).

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text: Admits 4 adults and any children for free to the Jackson Homestead or the Durant-Kenrick House & Grounds.
source_phrases: Admits 4 adults and any children for free to the Jackson Homestead or the Durant-Kenrick House & Grounds.

passes.title: Historic Newton
passes.benefit_text: Admits 2 people at $10 per person (special exhibition + general admission).
source_phrases: Admits 2 people at $10 per person (special exhibition + general admission).

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Admits 4 people at $5.00 per person (General Admissions ONLY).
Persons under 18 not included in admission count and always admitted free.
source_phrases: Admits 4 people at $5.00 per person (General Admissions ONLY).
Persons under 18 not included in admission count and always admitted free.

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text: Admits up to 4 people for free.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people for free.

passes.title: Larz Anderson Auto Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at $2.00 per person to any Mass Audubon Wildlife Sanctuary.
This includes access to Drumlin Farm, both a working farm and wildlife sanctuary.
MONDAYS: many paid sanctuaries are closed. Please check the hours of your intended destination before booking.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at $2.00 per person to any Mass Audubon Wildlife Sanctuary.
This includes access to Drumlin Farm, both a working farm and wildlife sanctuary.
MONDAYS: many paid sanctuaries are closed. Please check the hours of your intended destination before booking.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass admits one vehicle for free to Massachusetts State Parks. 
Patrons may book up to 2 passes per day.
source_phrases: Each pass admits one vehicle for free to Massachusetts State Parks.
Patrons may book up to 2 passes per day.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Admits 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children (ages 7-17) at $10 each -  applies to both special exhibition + general admission
Free for children under 6 years of age.
source_phrases: Admits 2 adults at $15 each and up to 4 children (ages 7-17) at $10 each -  applies to both special exhibition + general admission
Free for children under 6 years of age.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls (General Admission). 
Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
source_phrases: Admits up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls (General Admission).
Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
Admits 4 people at 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium for only adult and child pricing. 
Valid only for Aquarium admission.
source_phrases: Admits 4 people at 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium for only adult and child pricing.
Valid only for Aquarium admission.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
source_phrases: Admits 2 at half-priced admission.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
passes.benefit_text:
Admits up to 2 people at no cost.
Children under 12 always have free admission.
source_phrases: Admits up to 2 people at no cost.
Children under 12 always have free admission.

passes.title: New England Quilt Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits 2 people at $12.00 per person. 
Youth under 16 receive free admission.
source_phrases: Admits 2 people at $12.00 per person.
Youth under 16 receive free admission.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
This Coupon pass admits one household and is good for a 1-week voucher of free access Newton's West Suburban YMCA. (Valid at both the Church St. and Wells Ave locations.)
Pickup up to one week in advance. Redeem the coupon at the YMCA within 1 week of date written on coupon. You will receive 1 week of free access beginning the date you redeem at the YMCA. 
Each household may check out a YMCA pass once per calendar year.
Check the Pool, Gym, and Group Exercise Classes Schedule here .
source_phrases: This Coupon pass admits one household and is good for a 1-week voucher of free access Newton's West Suburban YMCA. (Valid at both the Church St. and Wells Ave locations.)
Pickup up to one week in advance. Redeem the coupon at the YMCA within 1 week of date written on coupon. You will receive 1 week of free access beginning the date you redeem at the YMCA.
Each household may check out a YMCA pass once per calendar year.
Check the Pool, Gym, and Group Exercise Classes Schedule here .

passes.title: West Suburban Ymca
passes.benefit_text: Admits 2 adults at half price and children (17 and under) free.
source_phrases: Admits 2 adults at half price and children (17 and under) free.

passes.title: Worcester Art Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child. 
Valid only during regular daytime hours. Not valid for ZooLights.
source_phrases: Admits 6 people at $9.00 per adult and $6.00 per child.
Valid only during regular daytime hours. Not valid for ZooLights.
